title: quercus minima
intro: Quercus minima, also known as the dwarf live oak or small live oak, is a small evergreen tree or shrub native to the southeastern United States. The plant is rich in flavonoids and tannins, which are known for their medicinal properties, including anti-inflammatory and antioxidant effects. The health benefits of Quercus minima are attributed to its ability to lower cholesterol levels, reduce blood pressure, and improve cardiovascular health. The plant can be prepared as a tea or infusion, and its leaves can also be dried and used in herbal capsules or tablets.
